title: ENE - Ender No Ender
description: This datapack prevents players from placing Ender Dragon Egg in Ender Chest
body:
This datapack prevents any player from placing Ender Dragon Egg in Ender Chest

this also works if the egg is placed in bundle or shulkerbox and any (vanilla obtainable) combination of those 2

if player tries to place egg (or item containing the egg) in the e-chest then the egg (or entire item) is removed from the enderchest and given back to player

all data about the egg (and shulkerbox/bundle) is preserved, so if have for example renamed dragon egg that name will stay on the egg (same for shulkerboxes/bundles and all items inside them)

in case you already have world/server and you just discovered this datapack dont worry it can be added to existing world. when this datapack is added to the world that already existed then when player with dragon egg in enderchest joins the world dragon egg (or item containing it) will be poped out of their ender chest and returned to them (this might take few seconds)

removing this datapack from the world (if it was activated) does leave only storage named "temp:temp"
